series.series_name: CBOE Volatility Index (VIX)

series.description: U.S. Dollar Index, a key external pressure factor for RUB/USD.

series.series_name: U.S. Treasury 10Y Yield
series.description: 10-year U.S. Treasury yield, a global rates and risk factor.

series.series_name: Urals crude oil, USD/bbl, daily close
series.description: Daily Urals crude price, a fundamental oil factor for the ruble.

metadata.note: Uses the POST multipart history XHR JSON endpoint and splits requests into max 5-year date windows. The adapter first visits the history page to refresh the AJAX nonce and cookies, then retries once on 403 with the refreshed session.

series.series_name: Urals crude oil, USD/bbl, live 15m snapshot
series.description: Intraday update of the oil factor, useful for 15-minute nowcasting.

metadata.note: Parses the current page price into 15-minute observation buckets only during the configured Moscow trading session and only on Russian working days according to isdayoff.ru.

sources._comment: Nowcast group: Russia FX and domestic market prices

series.series_name: U.S. Dollar / Russian Ruble
series.description: Market USD/RUB proxy that can provide more timely information than the official Bank of Russia rate.

series.series_name: CBR official USD/RUB rate, RUB per 1 USD
series.description: Forecast target: the Bank of Russia official RUB/USD exchange rate.

metadata.note: Initial run backfills official CBR daily history from XML_dynamic.asp. The 15-minute schedule checks whether CBR has published a new official daily rate; it is not an intraday market quote.

series.series_name: MOEX CNY/RUB TOM, daily close
series.description: Important market proxy for the ruble through CNY/RUB, especially when the role of USD/RUB on MOEX is limited.

metadata.note: One-off backfill source. Run manually when historical daily CNY/RUB TOM candles need to be loaded into observations.

series.series_name: MOEX CNY/RUB TOM, 15m close aggregated from 1m candles

metadata.note: Runs every calendar day and uses MOEX ISS marketdata.TRADINGSTATUS to skip periods when the trading session is not open. MOEX ISS does not publish native interval=15 candles; this source aggregates ISS interval=1 candles into closed 15-minute bars.

series.series_name: MOEX Russia Index, daily close

metadata.note: One-off backfill source. Run manually when historical daily MOEX index candles need to be loaded into observations.

series.series_name: MOEX Russia Index, 15m close aggregated from 1m candles

metadata.note: Runs every calendar day and uses MOEX ISS marketdata.TRADINGSESSION to skip periods when the index session is not open. MOEX ISS does not publish native interval=15 candles; this source aggregates ISS interval=1 candles into closed 15-minute bars.

series.series_name: RTS Index, daily close
series.description: RTS Index, a proxy for Russian equity and risk sentiment.

metadata.note: One-off backfill source. Run manually when historical daily RTS index candles need to be loaded into observations.

series.series_name: RTS Index, 15m close aggregated from 1m candles
series.description: Intraday RTS Index, a timely Russian market risk sentiment indicator.

metadata.note: Runs every calendar day and uses MOEX ISS marketdata.TRADINGSESSION to skip periods when the RTS index session is not open. MOEX ISS does not publish native interval=15 candles; this source aggregates ISS interval=1 candles into closed 15-minute bars.

sources._comment: Nowcast group: Russia monetary policy, liquidity, credit, and OFZ curve

series.series_name: Bank of Russia key rate, percent per annum
series.description: Bank of Russia key rate, the core monetary policy factor.

metadata.note: Backfills and updates the Bank of Russia key rate from the official KeyRate page. Values are stored only at CBR key-rate decision publication times. reference_start and published_at are the decision publication timestamp; reference_end is extended until the next decision publication minus one millisecond, or to the current load time for the latest decision.

series.series_name: Bank of Russia key rate meeting dummy
series.description: Bank of Russia meeting dummy, capturing monetary policy event risk.

metadata.note: Backfills and updates a 0/1 event dummy for Bank of Russia key rate meetings from the official calendar of key rate decisions. Values are stored in observations only. reference_start and reference_end use the expected press-release publication time from the CBR page, converted from Moscow time to UTC. For backfill, planned meetings use the publication date of that year's calendar and unscheduled meetings use the meeting publication date; live updates use the page's Last updated date.

sources.source_name: CBR RUONIA dynamics and calculation parameters

series.series_name: RUONIA rate, percent per annum
series.description: Actual overnight ruble money market rate.

series.series_name: RUONIA transactions volume, billion RUB
series.description: RUONIA transaction volume, a proxy for money market liquidity.

series.series_name: RUONIA transactions count
series.description: Number of RUONIA trades, a measure of money market activity.

series.series_name: RUONIA participants count
series.description: Number of RUONIA participants, a measure of market depth.

series.series_name: RUONIA minimum rate, percent per annum
series.description: Lower bound of RUONIA rates.

series.series_name: RUONIA 25th percentile rate, percent per annum
series.description: 25th percentile of RUONIA rates, describing the shape of the rate distribution.

series.series_name: RUONIA 75th percentile rate, percent per annum
series.description: 75th percentile of RUONIA rates, describing the shape of the rate distribution.

series.series_name: RUONIA maximum rate, percent per annum
series.description: Upper bound of RUONIA rates, reflecting stress or dispersion in the money market.

metadata.note: Backfills and updates RUONIA dynamics from the official Bank of Russia RUONIA dynamics page. Volume is stored in billion rubles; rates are annual percent points.

sources.source_name: CBR Russia money supply and credit to economy

series.series_name: Russia money supply M2, billion RUB
series.description: M2 money supply, an indicator of ruble liquidity.

series.series_name: Russia household loans, billion RUB
series.description: Household loans, a proxy for domestic demand and credit activity.

series.series_name: Russia corporate loans, billion RUB
series.description: Corporate loans, a proxy for the credit cycle.

metadata.note: Single live job for RU_M2, RU_CREDIT_HOUSEHOLDS and RU_CREDIT_CORPORATES. It backfills the official Bank of Russia credit_m2x.xlsx file from 2015-01-01, then each run compares against the latest stored observation by series and inserts only newly published periods. Values are from the 'млрд рублей' sheet and are stored in billion rubles. publication_at is read from official CBR version tooltips when present; older historical rows use a same-month publication-date estimate configured by publication_at_fallback_day and are marked in raw_payload.publication_at_source.

series.series_name: CBR structural liquidity deficit/surplus
CBR structural liquidity deficit/surplus, new methodology
Credit institutions correspondent accounts with CBR
Average required reserves

metadata.note: CBR SecInfo SOAP endpoint. WSDL documentation: Information on securities market, version 25.04.2024.

series.series_name: CBR OFZ zero-coupon yield curve, 1Y
series.description: Short end of the OFZ curve, reflecting Bank of Russia rate expectations and ruble yields.

series.series_name: CBR OFZ zero-coupon yield curve, 3Y
series.description: Middle segment of the OFZ curve, reflecting monetary policy expectations.

series.series_name: CBR OFZ zero-coupon yield curve, 5Y
series.description: Medium-term ruble yield from the OFZ zero-coupon curve.

series.series_name: CBR OFZ zero-coupon yield curve, 10Y
series.description: Long end of the OFZ curve, reflecting risk premium and long-term expectations.

metadata.note: Uses CBR SecInfo zcyc_paramsXML. Values are annual percentage yields at the requested maturity points.

sources._comment: Nowcast group: Russia prices, activity, and external trade

sources.source_name: Rosstat Russia CPI MoM – official live workbook

series.series_name: Russia CPI inflation, month-over-month, percent – Rosstat live
series.description: Official Rosstat monthly CPI MoM live check from the latest ipc_mes workbook on the Rosstat prices page.

metadata.note: Separate live-only Rosstat CPI MoM series. The adapter checks https://rosstat.gov.ru/statistics/price every 15 minutes, downloads the latest ipc_mes_*.xlsx workbook, takes all all-items monthly CPI index rows from sheet 01 since scrape.start_date, stores value as index minus 100, and writes directly to observations. For backfill, published_at is the configured typical Rosstat publication date: the 15th day of the following month at 10:00 Europe/Moscow. In live mode, published_at is the actual ingestion timestamp.

sources.source_name: Rosstat Russia industrial producer prices MoM – official live workbook

series.series_name: Russia industrial producer prices, month-over-month, percent – Rosstat live
series.description: Official Rosstat producer price index for industry, month-over-month, from the latest Proizvoditeli_Ind_VED workbook on the Rosstat prices page.

metadata.note: Separate live Rosstat industrial producer prices MoM series. The adapter checks https://rosstat.gov.ru/statistics/price every 15 minutes, downloads the latest Proizvoditeli_Ind_VED_MM-YYYY.xlsx workbook from the Industrial goods producer prices section, takes the aggregate industry row for the Russian Federation, stores value as index minus 100, and writes directly to observations. For backfill, published_at is the configured typical Rosstat publication date: the 20th day of the following month at 10:00 Europe/Moscow. In live mode, published_at is the actual ingestion timestamp.

sources.source_name: Rosstat Russia retail trade turnover MoM – official live workbook

series.series_name: Russia retail trade turnover, month-over-month, percent – Rosstat live
series.description: Official Rosstat retail trade turnover MoM calculated from monthly turnover levels in the latest Oborot workbooks.

metadata.note: Separate live Rosstat retail turnover MoM series. The adapter checks https://rosstat.gov.ru/statistics/roznichnayatorgovlya every 15 minutes, downloads the latest Oborot_*.xls and Oborot_m_*.xlsx retail turnover workbooks, calculates MoM as current monthly turnover divided by previous monthly turnover minus 1, and writes directly to observations. For backfill, published_at is the configured typical Rosstat publication date: the 29th day of the following month at 10:00 Europe/Moscow. In live mode, published_at is the actual ingestion timestamp.

sources.source_name: CBR Russia trade balance - live file check

series.series_name: Russia goods trade balance, million USD, balance of payments methodology
series.description: Goods exports FOB minus goods imports FOB from the official Bank of Russia trade workbook.

metadata.note: Single live/backfill source for RU_TRADE_BALANCE. Each run reads the official Bank of Russia trade.xls workbook from https://www.cbr.ru/statistics/macro_itm/external_sector/etg/ and writes directly to observations. Value is goods exports FOB minus goods imports FOB, million USD, balance of payments methodology. For backfill, published_at is the typical publication timing: the 13th day of the second month after the reference month at 10:00 Europe/Moscow. In live mode, published_at is the actual ingestion timestamp.

sources.source_name: Minfin Russia oil/gas fiscal revenue and FX operations - live feed

series.series_name: Russia federal budget oil and gas revenues, billion RUB
series.description: Federal oil and gas budget revenues, linking oil prices, the budget, and FX operations.

series.series_name: Russia Minfin FX and gold purchase/sale operation amount, billion RUB
series.description: Finance Ministry and Bank of Russia FX and gold operations, a direct FX demand and supply factor.

series.series_name: Russia additional oil and gas revenues, billion RUB
series.description: Additional oil and gas budget revenues from the Minfin oil/gas revenue table.

metadata.note: Bootstrap + 15-minute live updater for Minfin oil/gas fiscal data. Each run first reads historical monthly observations from storage/exports/russia_fiscal_oilgas_monthly_from_2017_02.csv, then reads the official Minfin document page table, skips annual-total columns, and writes directly to observations. CSV columns are mapped to RU_FISCAL_OILGAS_REVENUE, RU_FISCAL_FX_OPERATION_AMOUNT, and RU_FISCAL_ADDITIONAL_OILGAS_REVENUE. Historical rows use published_at from the CSV; live rows use the Minfin document update date, with publication date as fallback.

metadata.note: Loads daily RU tax dummy variables from storage/exports/ru_tax_dummy_calendar_2015_2026.csv. The scheduled run checks daily; only during the usual production-calendar release window (September +/- 15 days) it looks for the next year's RU production calendar and appends generated dummy rows when the calendar becomes available.
